title: feat: add a11y command for axe-core accessibility audits

deterministic.style: pass (em dashes present but permitted by AGENTS.md house norm; no `--` prose dashes, no emojis)
deterministic.surfaces: pass (all 5 doc surfaces + mcp.rs parity present)
deterministic.e2e: pass (86 passed, 0 failed, real Chrome incl. 3 a11y tests)

runs: a11y <url> against a hand-built page with 8 real violations + cross-origin iframe: frame-boundary selector paths (iframe -> button, iframe -> img) confirmed the cross-frame runPartial/finishRun merge
--selector #main scoped to 1 violation (reused open page, no re-navigate)
selector no-match -> friendly 'Element not found' error (not raw internal string)
not_driven: MCP round-trip via agent_browser_a11y tool — call_a11y delegates to the same CLI path; unit-tested formatting

lenses.docs-behavior-parity: run — pass (offline/CSP, Safari/iOS-unsupported claims match code; WebDriver unsupported list updated)
lenses.reference-implementation-oracle: run — axe cross-frame runPartial/finishRun merge; verified empirically by 3 a11y e2e tests + live dogfood
lenses.boundary-pipeline-trace: run — frame/shadow/process boundary; verified by nested-frame + sibling-frame-order + shadow-target e2e + live iframe audit
lenses.new-failure-outcome-propagation: run — iframe_sessions retention refactor; off-diff consumers (snapshot/screenshot/click) read stale-safe frame_id keys; verified by full e2e
lenses.error-path-forcing: run — parser + policy + audit error branches; unit-tested + live-forced
lenses.new-domain-matrix: run — a11y parser flag/value guard; unit-tested incl. adversarial flag-as-value
lenses.deliberate-default: run — iframe retention across nav is intended (background-tab OOPIF preservation), tested
lenses.complexity-budget: skipped — frame counts bounded; per-session getFrameTree with visited-set cycle guard

issue_candidates: handle_requests enables Network only on the top session, not active_iframe_sessions (handle_har_start loops over them) — the `requests` command may not surface cross-origin iframe traffic. Pre-existing: filter + enable shape unchanged by this PR. Unrelated to a11y (separate surface). Follow-up issue, ~4-line fix mirroring har_start's loop.

refresh_active_iframe_sessions uses unwrap_or_default(), so a transient CDP getFrameTree failure silently empties active_iframe_sessions and momentarily under-scopes network/HAR capture. By-design reliability tradeoff.
exemptions: Em dashes in prose and Rust doc comments: exempt per AGENTS.md ('— allowed sparingly').
CHANGELOG.md not updated: exempt — AGENTS.md releases are manual single-PR affairs; feature branches do not edit the changelog.
Isolated-world contexts from createIsolatedWorld not explicitly destroyed: exempt — Chrome GCs isolated worlds on frame navigation/detach; not a within-session leak.
